title: Silicone Spatula Cooking Spoon, 3-in-1 Silicone Kitchen Spoon, Heat Resistant Nonstick Solid Spoon with Deep Groove and Measurement Mark for Frying, Serving Soup and Rice (Beige)
features: FOOD GRADE SILICONE SPATULA SPOON: Our silicone spatula spoon is crafted from high quality silicone materials that are BPA-free, non-toxic and safe to use. Built-in high hardness inner core - stainless steel, the outer layer is soft silicone wrap, heat resistance temperature 450ºF / 230ºC, will not change color, deformation or melt, cooking and frying without odor.rice spoon

CREATIVE DESIGN 1: Silicone spoon unique flat spatula head design, well adapted to different sizes and depths of the pot, easy to stir-fry and serve, while not damaging the pot coating, especially the pot body edges can be scraped very clean. The concave surface in the middle of the spatula body can also scoop soup and serve rice.medicine spoon

CREATIVE DESIGN 2: The kitchen spoon is equipped with a practical graduated line inside, which helps to add more accurate liquids or powders while cooking, perfect for making equal portions of meals for friends and family. Comfortable handle, natural grip, anti-scald silicone handle is not easy to conduct heat, you can better protect your hands from burns.

EASY TO CLEAN: Silicone cooking spoon is easy to clean and maintain, simply wipe with hot water or put in the dishwasher to easily clean and remove excess grease and food. Thumb stops are non-slip to save effort, hanging holes are designed for easy storage, and the one-piece seamless silicone design prevents food and dirt build-up for safe and healthy cooking.plastic serving spoons

3 IN 1 SILICONE SPATULA SPOON: Our spatula spoon can fry, serve soup and rice, perfect replacement for rice spoon, soup spoon and flat spatula, one silicone spoon is equivalent to getting 3 kitchen utensils. Great for baking, cooking, stirring, mixing, scraping all kinds of food.
description: Size:31CM * 6.8CM Colour:Beige Material:Food grade silicone + nylon + stainless steel Heat-resistant temperature:-40°C-230°C
